structure: CoSn-type kagome, P6/mmm (No.191), ibrav=4, nat=6 (Mo 3f kagome z=0; Sn 1a z=0 + 2d z=1/2)
ecut: vc-relax 60/240 Ry (lattice find); scf 90/360 Ry @ 12x12x12 k (133 irr k, E_F, m); bands 90/360 Ry Gamma-K-M-Gamma-A (49 k, david diago_full_acc=.false., nbnd=50). NC SG15 ONCV PBE-1.2 (Mo,Sn z_valence=14, 84 e-).
n_ef: metallic: 3 bands cross E_F (bands 42,43 dispersive kagome/Dirac; band 44 just above); DOS(E_F) not separately computed (no dos.x run needed for gate). Flat-band manifold (Mo-4d kagome, bands 36-38) sits 2.0-2.5 eV BELOW E_F.
evidence_cmd: vast pod 41056723 (RTX 4090, ssh4.vast.ai:16722, micromamba qe=7.5): mpirun -np 16 pw.x -in scf.in (nspin=2, 16 iter, conv 2.5e-11 Ry); mpirun -np 32 pw.x -in bands_sparse.in (david, diago_full_acc=.false.); bands.x -> mosn_bands.dat. scf.out: 'the Fermi energy is 15.6420 ev', 'total magnetization = 0.00 Bohr mag/cell', 'convergence has been achieved in 16 iterations'.
interpretation: MoSn is NON-MAGNETIC (m=0.00 uB, PASS half) -- Co->Mo substitution DID kill CoSn's magnetism as predicted. BUT the kagome flat band sits ~2.4 eV BELOW E_F (dE=-2.38 eV), even DEEPER than CoSn's -0.44 eV. Flat band is far from E_F -> no flat-band physics at the Fermi level. Pre-registered gate FALSIFIED (|dE|=2.38 eV >> 0.2 eV INCONCLUSIVE ceiling). CLOSED-negative.
notes: GPU-POD WALL-BREAK: summer free-core SCF hit >14-16 min/iter (Mo-4d high-ecut Davidson); on the rented RTX 4090 pod's 128 dedicated cores (np=16), the SAME full-ecut-90 nspin=2 Davidson ran ~6 s of CPU/iter -> full SCF (16 iter) converged to 2.5e-11 Ry in ~6 min. >150x per-iter speedup; PW compute wall CLEARED. Note: real GPU davidson was UNAVAILABLE (conda-forge QE has no CUDA build; QE-GPU needs NVHPC), so the win came from many dedicated CPU cores, not GPU offload -- stated honestly (d6). Bands non-SCF david stalled on empty bands at conv 1e-9/full_acc -> FIXED with diago_full_acc=.false. + conv 1e-6 + sparse 49-pt path (band positions converge to <meV, far inside 0.1 eV gate resolution). Magnetization collapse trajectory (real SCF): 3.96->2.50->2.17->1.35->0.76->0.48->0.21->0.08->0.03->0.01->0.00 uB across iterations -- artificial starting_magnetization(Mo)=0.3 decays to true NM ground state. Pre-registered gate (c9, no goalpost move): PASS |dE|<0.10 AND m<0.5; FALSIFY dE>0.2 OR m>0.5; INCONCLUSIVE 0.1<=|dE|<=0.2 AND m<0.5. Recommend fallback per deck: LaRu3Si2 -> LaCoSi (kagome/flat-band leads with flat band closer to E_F). Evidence harvested to scripts/scratch/qforge_harvest/mosn/ (scf.out, bands_sparse.out, mosn_bands.dat[.gnu]). Pod DOWN after harvest.
